Headline: #7 Harrison Temporary Westbound Reroute near Congress/St. Louis
ShortDescription: Westbound 7 Harrison buses are temporarily rerouted via Van Buren, Homan, Jackson, Independence and Van Buren: due to, police activity near Congress/St. Louis.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How will this affect my trip?

 

Westbound #7 Harrison buses are temporarily rerouted via Van Buren, Homan, Jackson, Independence, Van Buren and over regular route: due to, police activity near Congress/St. Louis.

Eastbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
